config.entry: stop 1 tick beyond signal bar extreme (High 1 / Low 1)
config.stop_spike: 1 tick beyond the spike's start extreme (Brooks: 'the risk is to the bottom of the spike')
config.target_new_high: 1 tick beyond the spike extreme (Brooks: 'at least a new high')
config.target_measured_move: spike height projected from the spike extreme (Brooks: 'a measured move')
config.adr: per-symbol average daily range (mean session high-low, full sample); spike_pct = spike height / ADR
